Authored by GPT-5 (Codex Desktop). Session 2741c4bd-92b2-428b-92d3-ab718d9a7c41.
FAIR-band: in-band [15/30 — current author count over last 30 merged]

Resolves #10684

Keeps the Antigravity fresh-session adapter on the native `antigravity-cli` path across platforms instead of falling back to tmux outside macOS. The implementation adds `ANTIGRAVITY_CLI_PATH`, host defaults, and PATH-based executable resolution with an actionable missing-path diagnostic, plus focused unit coverage for mock dispatch and failed overrides.

Evidence: L2 (mock executable dispatch, missing-path diagnostic unit coverage, and static syntax checks) -> L4 required (real Windows/Linux Antigravity host fresh-session spawn proof). Residual: host-level Antigravity launch proof [#10684].

## Deltas from ticket
- Scope stayed limited to the Antigravity CLI path. Claude and Codex non-macOS behavior still use the existing tmux fallback unless their own adapters are explicitly made cross-platform by separate tickets.
- No live Antigravity host was launched; coverage uses the established mock-executable pattern for harness adapters.

## Test Evidence
- `node --check ai/scripts/resumeHarness.mjs`
- `git diff --check origin/dev...HEAD`
- `npm run test-unit -- test/playwright/unit/ai/scripts/resumeHarness.spec.mjs` — 18 passed, 2 skipped. Ran with sandbox escalation because `.neo-ai-data/wake-daemon` is a symlink outside this Codex writable checkout and the existing lock-file tests need to write there.
- Freshness: rebased onto `origin/dev` after fetch; outgoing log contains only `e057204e5 fix(ai): resolve antigravity cli cross-platform (#10684)`.

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] On a Windows or Linux Antigravity host, set `ANTIGRAVITY_CLI_PATH` or install `antigravity` on PATH and run a controlled fresh-session recovery probe for `@neo-gemini-3-1-pro`.
